goal: Add internationalization support to the greeting module
context: Simple Python greeting module. Add i18n support with a translations module and update the greeting functions to accept a locale parameter. This is a full lifecycle test: init → plan → execute → review → close.

tasks.title: Create translations module
tasks.goal: Create src/translations.py with a dictionary of greeting translations for English, Spanish, and French.
constraints: Use a simple dict mapping locale codes to greeting templates
acceptance: Contains translations for en, es, fr

tasks.title: Update greeting functions for i18n
tasks.goal: Update greet and farewell in greeting.py to accept an optional locale parameter and use translations.
constraints: Fallback to English if locale not found

tasks.title: Update main and tests for i18n
tasks.goal: Update main.py to demonstrate i18n usage and add tests for Spanish and French greetings.
constraints: Add at least one test per supported locale
acceptance: Tests cover en, es, fr locales
